title: Bliss Dimension
body:
# _**Bliss Dimension**_

- The Bliss Dimension is a new dimension added by this mod that is a geographical mirror image of the overworld and has no hostile mobs and such like that.

## Features

 - Bliss Dimension.

 - Blissful Plains. (Main biome of the Bliss Dimension.)

 - Bliss Gem. (Used for making the Bliss Portal.)

## How to make a Bliss Portal

 - Make a Nether Portal shape with Quartz Bricks.

 - Use the Bliss Gem to light it and in you go!

## How to make the Bliss Gem

 - Make a diamond shape with diamonds in a Crafting Table.

 - Place an Iron Ingot in the center and claim your reward!
